blended.narrative: Mt. Spokane is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,125 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days. Strong winds with gusts to 44 mph may cause lift holds.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 1.4" of snow, highs of 34°F, gusts to 44 mph.
Tomorrow: 7" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 3" over the past week. Current depth: 37".
